$comment: Locally-owned materialization: this schema is also published in the skill-quality plugin (melodic-software/claude-code-plugins). It stays in-repo because the evals-json-schema lefthook lane passes it to check-jsonschema by repo-relative path, and the skills-evals workflow hands the same path to authoring agents — neither can reach the plugin's CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT copy. Schema changes belong upstream in the plugin, not in this local copy.
title: Skill evaluations
description: Schema for .claude/skills/<name>/evals/evals.json. Supports both rich and minimal forms per .claude/rules/skill/evaluations.md. Rich form adds per-case `name` (kebab-case) and `expectations` (or upstream-named `assertions`). Both assertions and expectations are permitted as optional alternatives (skill-creator upstream uses `assertions`; repo's rich-form skills use `expectations`).

skill_name.description: Skill directory name under .claude/skills/. Matches the slug used by the slash invocation.

id.description: Stable identifier within the skill's eval set. Integer or string.

prompt.description: Input prompt for this eval case.

name.description: Optional kebab-case identifier (rich form). Human-readable case label.

expected_output.description: Optional natural-language description of the expected output shape or content.

files.description: Optional list of fixture file paths required by this case.

assertions.description: Optional list of objectively-verifiable assertions (skill-creator upstream field name). Items are skill-author-defined; schema does not constrain shape.

expectations.description: Optional list of objectively-verifiable expectations (this repo's field name across rich-form skills). Items are skill-author-defined; schema does not constrain shape. Equivalent role to `assertions`; skill author picks one.
